businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest publicly traded Ethereum holder — applying MicroStrategy's Bitcoin playbook to Ethereum as a digital asset treasury company
businessSummary.description: Originally a Bitcoin mining company, pivoted to Ethereum treasury strategy after Tom Lee (Fundstrat co-founder) joined. As of 3/1, holds 4,473,587 ETH (3.71% of total supply), total crypto + cash holdings $9.9B. Closed at $21.12 (+7.92%) on 3/4. Purchased ~51,000 ETH ($98M) last week. Annual staking revenue $172M. Trading at P/B 0.71x, a 29% discount to NAV. MAVAN staking platform launching early 2026. Forward P/E 27.79x.
howTheyMakeMoney: ETH Treasury: 4,473,587 ETH ($8.84B at $1,976/ETH) — core value proposition
ETH Staking Revenue: 3,040,483 ETH staked, $172M annual revenue
Venture Investments: Beast Industries ($200M), Eightco Holdings ($14M) 'moonshot' portfolio
keyProducts: Ethereum Treasury Strategy: Holding 3.71% of total ETH supply
MAVAN: Made in America Validator Network — proprietary staking platform (early 2026 launch)
ETH Staking: 68% of holdings staked via 3 staking provider partnerships
Moonshot Portfolio: Beast Industries, Eightco Holdings, etc.

moats.description: Holding 3.71% of total ETH supply. Irreplaceable market position.
Public stock providing ETH exposure. Institutional investor access without ETF.
68% staked + MAVAN platform providing yield advantage vs simple holding.

risks.description: 90%+ of NAV is ETH. BMNR price drops proportionally with ETH decline.

risks.description: Share count increased 42x in one year. Significant existing shareholder dilution.

risks.description: Stricter US crypto regulation could directly impact ETH staking revenue and business model.

risks.description: TTM operating loss of -$234.87M. Staking revenue insufficient to cover operating costs.

risks.description: ETH at $1,976 in recent weakness. Further decline would reduce NAV.

buyReasons.title: P/B 0.71x — 29% discount to NAV
buyReasons.rationale: Book value $27.54 vs price $21.12. Rapid gap closure on ETH rebound.

buyReasons.title: +7.92% daily surge — momentum shift
buyReasons.rationale: Market responding positively to ETH holdings expansion. Potential bottom formation.

buyReasons.title: $172M annual staking revenue
buyReasons.rationale: Growing passive income. Additional revenue expected from MAVAN launch.

buyReasons.title: 3.71% of ETH supply monopoly
buyReasons.rationale: Irreplaceable position. Institutional proxy for ETH exposure.

overallOpinion: BMNR surged +7.92% on 3/4, demonstrating market confidence in its ETH accumulation strategy.
Trading at P/B 0.71x, a 29% discount to NAV. ETH price recovery is both the biggest catalyst and risk.
Share dilution (YoY +4,158%) and ongoing operating losses are structural concerns. This is a leveraged crypto bet similar to MicroStrategy.
At ETH $1,976, downside risk and upside potential coexist. MAVAN launch is the next catalyst.
